p.strong: Select k=3 random peers from n=7 candidates

ul.li: Bold / Highlighted: Element changed in current step
i: Current iteration index (0 to k-1)
j: Random index chosen from range [i, n-1]

ol.li: After step i, positions [0..i] contain i+1 randomly selected peers.
j range [i, n-1] ensures every remaining element has 1/remaining chance.
